idea.title: Wishlist Wheel
idea.hook: You're the CEO — pin five release dates on the year calendar and survive four quarters of leaks, slips, and exec walkouts without burning investor patience.
idea.prototype: Vertical year calendar (Q1-Q4). Five project cards (Open World, Sequel, Live Service, Indie Pickup, Remake) drag onto quarters at start. Each quarter resolves with 3 random events (engine bug = slip risk, leak = +marketing burn, exec leaves = -budget). Spend marketing budget to hold a date, or accept delay (-patience). End-of-year score = projects shipped within announced quarter.
idea.mutation_of: Telegram-digest 'Hype Calendar' + meownauts/28304 GTA 6 delay-alibi signal + Wishlist Climb adjacent.
idea.why_novel: Calendar-as-board is uncovered. Reverse-tycoon at a distance — but planning, not numbers-go-up. No release-date game has shipped.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Investor patience meter + marketing budget cap
idea.lose_condition: Investor patience hits zero from cumulative delays and missed dates.
